title: Visiting Doctor
subtitle: Select an available account (VD1–VD20), then sign in with the default password.
default_password_hint: Default password: 12345 (you must change it on first login).
in_use_alert: {{username}} is already in use{{by}}{{until}}. Please choose another account.
setup_subtitle: Account {{username}} — required before you can use the clinical portal.

admin.title: Visiting doctor pool
admin.subtitle: Monitor shared accounts VD1–VD20, release abandoned slots, and print reception cards.
admin.default_password_note: Default password for new claims: {{password}} (doctor must change on first login).
admin.release_confirm: Release {{username}}? The doctor will be signed out and the account reset for the next visitor.

my_visit.title: My visiting doctor stay
my_visit.subtitle: Account {{username}} — review your visit dates or extend your stay.
my_visit.extend_hint: Choose a new end date on or after your current end date. The account resets automatically after that date.
my_visit.expiring_banner: Your visit ends {{date}} ({{count}} day(s) left). Extend your stay if you need more time.
